summary: Immaculate DSBD sound captures a tight, well‑played show with standout performances of Picasso Moon, Black Peter and the Eyes>est>terrapin sequence.
review: The recording is an expertly remastered DSBD capture – crisp after an initial loud tuning burst – that showcases a very solid setlist. Reviewers rave about the precision of the band, especially the opening "Picasso Moon" and the flowing first‑set highlights, while a few criticize Vince’s keyboard solo on Fire on the Mountain.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers (5‑star) praise both the musical performance and the high‑quality soundboard recording; only a single low rating comments on keyboard playing, so overall rating is strongly positive.

recording_quality.technical_notes: DSBD source with immaculate remaster; initial tuning is very loud but volume can be lowered – otherwise crystal‑clear and well balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Solid first set with strong song selection; the concert flows smoothly and maintains high energy throughout.

band_member_comments.Keys: Several reviewers criticize Vince's keyboard solo on Fire on the Mountain, calling it poorly executed.
